title: Information about His Wills
description: According to al-Haytham b. 'Adi: Al-Mansur made a will for alMahdi when he set out for Mecca in Shawwal of this year (4 August-i September, 775). He had stopped at Qasr 'Abdawayh and stayed some days in the castle there. Al-Mahdi was with him, and he gave him his testament. While he was staying in Qasr

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 29
